author: lOrm
content: Landed src/tools/sleep.rs with execute_sleep() handler, registered in tools::registry. Caps at 300s (MAX_SLEEP_SECS), uses tokio::time::sleep when inside a multi-thread runtime via block_in_place, std::thread::sleep otherwise. 6 unit tests pin: missing arg / negative or non-integer / over-cap / zero is fast / one second actually sleeps / cap boundary accepted. Wired schema in registry under name 'sleep'. Permission target: none (no-op, listed in KNOWN_SAFE).
